data.body: 56d9 SSHSIG: empirically prototyped ssh-keygen -Y sign/verify + all 5 fail-closed cases (tamper/wrong-ns/unknown-principal/substituted-key/expired-window all exit 255) in OpenSSH 10.2. First plan-review BLOCKed (6) - reviewer wrongly claimed SSHSIG has no validity windows (my prototype disproves: valid-before in allowed_signers -> exit 255, the reason for the 8.9 floor). Rewrote ACs with the exact empirically-grounded mechanism (sign stdin->stdout; verify -s sigfile + stdin data; argv arrays; validity via allowed_signers valid-before/after >=8.9). Authored 12-test oracle (2 happy + 10 held-out fail-closed matrix), confirmed RED. Re-review running.
